issue_body_preview:
Fixes #537 
while adding any projects to any category, not working. WP PM >> Projects >> Edit >> Save it under any category >> Save. But after reloading the page, projects are not saving.

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

- **
test_description_zh: 在 WP Project Manager 中，进入项目列表页面，编辑一个已有项目，为其选择/分配一个分类（Category），点击保存。刷新页面后，查看该项目的分类设置是否仍然保留。
expected_result_zh: 编辑项目并分配分类后保存，刷新页面后该项目应仍然正确显示所分配的分类，分类设置被成功持久化保存。
